subcodes.first_line: O leaf ! God willing, through the bounties of the Lord of Creation, thou wilt be attached to the divine Lote-Tree in all the worlds
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه انشاء الله بعنایت مالک بریه در کل عوالم بسدره الهیه متمسک باشی فضل
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
